name: SCOBALL
NOTATION_PRICE_YEARLY
relations.query: SELECT notation, id, price_day, price_year, open_value, close_value, previous_value FROM ( SELECT np.notation AS notation, np.notation || '-' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM np.day) AS id, np.day AS price_day, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM np.day) AS price_year, np."OPEN" AS open_value, np."CLOSE" AS close_value, np.previous AS previous_value, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM np.day) AS price_month, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY np.notation, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM np.day) ORDER BY np.day DESC) AS rn FROM scoball.notation_price np ) sub WHERE rn = 1 AND price_month > 10

name: SCOBALL
CORPORATION_LATEST_NAME
relations.query: SELECT corporation, corp_name FROM ( SELECT corporation, name AS corp_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY corporation ORDER BY startdate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM scoball.corporation_name WHERE name IS NOT NULL ) sub WHERE rn = 1
